name: Dustline Seven
specialty: Specializing in tracking down and eliminating rogue magical entities that threaten the stability of the Undercity, Dustline Seven's reputation for ruthless efficiency sets them apart.

members.name: Thorne Ashwood
members.note: Scars crisscross his face from countless battles, a stark reminder of his past

members.name: Vexil Ironshield
members.note: Equipped with an enchanted warhammer, his heavy footsteps echo through the Undercity

members.name: Eira Nightshade
members.note: Known for her ethereal glow and the mysterious crystals she carries

members.name: Jax Stoneshaper
members.note: His quick wit and charm have earned him many allies and a few enemies

visual: Clad in black and stone-grey, they move through the Undercity like shadows, their armor and weapons adorned with the Obsidian Lotus symbol. Their disciplined demeanor and unwavering focus make them a formidable presence.
reputation_note: Whispers of Dustline Seven speak of a team that never fails, but also one that asks no questions and takes no prisoners
